summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin Booking Assignment feature. All 10 backend tests passed. Frontend tests confirmed 4-step booking flow and admin dashboard with Monteur column. Fixed route issue for /admin/dashboard.
seed_data_creation: Created test bookings during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin booking assignment feature is fully working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_admin_assign_booking.py. Fixed missing route /admin/dashboard in App.js.

admin_assign_endpoint.assign_success: PASS - Admin can assign booking to vakman
